incidents.title: High CPU on search-service

commits.message: fix: add rate limiting to search-service endpoint
commits.author: dev1

commits.message: feat: add new data processing pipeline
commits.author: dev2

logs: ERROR - Request processing time exceeded 30s
WARN - Thread pool exhausted, rejecting request
ERROR - connection reset by peer
incidents.ground_truth: Inefficient data processing pipeline in search-service causing CPU saturation. New pipeline feature added excessive computation per request without rate limiting.

incidents.title: OOM on notification-service

commits.message: fix: close database connections properly
commits.author: dev3

commits.message: feat: add in-memory result cache
commits.author: dev1

commits.message: refactor: update session management
commits.author: dev2

logs: ERROR - java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space
WARN - GC overhead limit exceeded
ERROR - Unable to create new native thread
incidents.ground_truth: Memory leak in notification-service caused by unbounded in-memory result cache. Cache entries are never evicted, causing heap to grow until OOM.

incidents.title: DB query timeout on api-gateway

alerts.title: DB query timeout on api-gateway
alerts.description: P95 query latency > 5s on primary database

commits.message: feat: add user analytics dashboard
commits.author: dev4

commits.message: perf: add index to orders table
commits.author: dev3

logs: WARN - Slow query detected: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM active_users) — 8.3s
ERROR - PostgreSQL: canceling statement due to statement timeout
WARN - connection pool at 95% capacity
incidents.ground_truth: Unoptimized query in api-gateway analytics dashboard: full table scan on orders with NOT IN subquery. Missing index and lack of pagination causes database CPU spike.

incidents.title: High error rate on api-gateway

commits.message: fix: handle null user profile in response
commits.author: dev1

logs: ERROR - NullPointerException: Cannot invoke 'User.getName()' because 'user' is null
ERROR - at com.api-gateway.UserController.getProfile(UserController.java:82)
WARN - request failed: GET /api/users/profile
incidents.ground_truth: NullPointerException in api-gateway UserController.getProfile() at line 82. A recent fix attempted to handle null user profile but missed the case where user object itself is null, not just the profile.

incidents.title: Upstream timeout on order-service

commits.message: chore: bump payment SDK version to 3.2.1
commits.author: dev5

commits.message: feat: add retry logic for payment calls
commits.author: dev4

logs: ERROR - HTTP timeout calling payment-gateway/charge after 30s
WARN - Retry attempt 2/3 for payment-gateway/charge
ERROR - circuit-breaker opened for payment-gateway
incidents.ground_truth: Payment gateway SDK upgrade to v3.2.1 changed the default timeout from 60s to 10s. Combined with new retry logic, rapid retries overwhelm the downstream causing cascade failure.

incidents.title: Upstream timeout on search-service

incidents.title: Disk full on api-gateway host

alerts.title: Write failures on api-gateway
alerts.description: Application unable to write logs and data files

commits.message: feat: add verbose debug logging to data pipeline
commits.author: dev2

commits.message: feat: enable request/response payload logging
commits.author: dev1

logs: ERROR - Disk quota exceeded: No space left on device
WARN - Log rotation failed: unable to archive /var/log/app/access.log
ERROR - write /data/db/journal: no space left on device
incidents.ground_truth: Verbose debug logging and request payload logging enabled in api-gateway data pipeline. Log volume increased 50x, log rotation settings not updated, causing disk to fill within hours.

incidents.title: Service unreachable

commits.message: ops: update security group rules for database access
commits.author: devops

logs: ERROR - dial tcp 10.0.3.12:5432: i/o timeout
WARN - connection to database primary lost, attempting failover
ERROR - all database replicas unreachable from current AZ
incidents.ground_truth: Network partition between payment-service AZ and database cluster. Recent security group update inadvertently removed the ingress rule for the application subnet on port 5432.

incidents.title: TLS handshake failures on user-service

alerts.title: TLS handshake failures on user-service
alerts.description: Clients reporting SSL errors connecting to user-service

alerts.title: Certificate warning
alerts.description: TLS certificate for api.example.com expires in 3 days

commits.message: ops: update load balancer TLS settings
commits.author: devops

logs: ERROR - SSL_ERROR_EXPIRED_CERT: certificate expired
ERROR - tls: first record does not look like a TLS handshake
WARN - acme renewal failed: Let's Encrypt endpoint unreachable
incidents.ground_truth: TLS certificate for user-service has expired. Auto-renewal failed because Let's Encrypt ACME endpoint was blocked by updated firewall rules. Load balancer TLS settings update did not include cert rotation.

incidents.title: Deployment failure on api-gateway

alerts.title: Deployment failure on api-gateway
alerts.description: New version of api-gateway failing health checks

commits.message: feat: add feature flags system
commits.author: dev1

commits.message: fix: correct database URL in config template
commits.author: dev2

logs: ERROR - Failed to parse config.yaml: unknown field 'feature_toggles'
ERROR - Application startup aborted due to configuration error
WARN - Config validation: environment 'production' not found in allowed values
incidents.ground_truth: Configuration parsing error in api-gateway: feature flags config schema mismatch. New 'feature_toggles' field was added to config but the JSON schema validation was not updated to include it, causing startup rejection.

incidents.title: Deployment failure on user-service

alerts.title: Deployment failure on user-service
alerts.description: New version of user-service failing health checks

incidents.ground_truth: Configuration parsing error in user-service: feature flags config schema mismatch. New 'feature_toggles' field was added to config but the JSON schema validation was not updated to include it, causing startup rejection.

incidents.title: Error rate spike after deployment

alerts.title: Error rate spike after deployment
alerts.description: notification-service error rate increased 10x after latest deploy

commits.message: refactor: migrate authentication to OAuth 2.0
commits.author: dev1

commits.message: fix: update auth token validation logic
commits.author: dev1

commits.message: chore: bump golang version to 1.22
commits.author: dev5

logs: ERROR - token validation failed: unexpected signature algorithm
WARN - JWT decode error: crypto/rsa: verification error
ERROR - authentication middleware rejection rate: 45%
incidents.ground_truth: Deploy regression in notification-service: OAuth 2.0 migration changed token signing algorithm from RS256 to RS384 but validation logic still expects RS256. Combined with Go 1.22 crypto behavior change, all tokens are rejected.
